task: Generate a single, premium macOS application icon (App-Store quality), 1024x1024, front-on.

app.name: Abendrot
app.meaning: German for 'the red glow of sunset'.
app.what_it_is: A calm macOS app that warms your screen's color temperature with the evening for healthier nights.
app.feeling: calm, premium, warm dusk; quiet confidence; never neon, never clinical, never cool/blue

icon_subject.concept: A 'Sunset arc over a horizon' — a warm half-sun / glowing arc cresting a clean horizon line low in the frame, its ember light blooming softly upward into a deep twilight sky. One simple, instantly-readable sunset mark.
icon_subject.primary_form: a smooth semicircular sun/arc, bottom-centered, rising just above a horizon line
icon_subject.glow: a soft warm bloom radiating from the sun up into the twilight — the last light of dusk

render_style.inspiration: Match the RENDERING LANGUAGE of the reference image: a glossy, dimensional, softly-glowing 3D 'glass-pebble' app icon — smooth, premium, tactile, with a gentle internal light source. Adopt its FINISH, DEPTH, and SOFT GLOW. Do NOT adopt its blue color, and do NOT include any face, eyes, or character.
render_style.dimensionality: the sun/arc reads as a slightly raised, light-emitting glass dome resting on the twilight ground; soft edges, not hard vector

shape.container: Apple squircle (continuous-curvature rounded rectangle), FULL-BLEED — the squircle itself is the artwork, no inner padding or border frame
shape.ground: the squircle is the deep twilight sky/ground
shape.presentation_shadow: a soft, diffuse ambient drop-shadow beneath the squircle on the studio backdrop (presentation only)

palette.rules: Warm amber light on a deep twilight near-black. Never pure black (#000), never cool or blue tones. Reserve pure white — use warm cream #F7ECD9 for the very hottest highlight, not #FFFFFF.

composition.layout: centered and symmetrical; sun/arc bottom-center cresting the horizon around the lower third; the warm glow fills the twilight above
composition.negative_space: generous, calm twilight sky above the sun
composition.small_size_legibility: must remain an unmistakable sunset-arc silhouette at 32px and 16px — keep the core shape bold and simple

lighting: the sun is the light source; warm light emanates from it and blooms upward; a faint cool-neutral specular sheen on the top edge of the glossy squircle reads as glass
mood: the quiet, premium calm of dusk — the moment the day softens

technical.framing: single icon, front-on, orthographic, no perspective, no scene, no device mockup
technical.backdrop: soft neutral off-white studio backdrop with the ambient shadow

negative_prompt: no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no faces, no eyes, no character, no mascot, no blue or cool colors, no teal, no pure black, no harsh neon, no lens-flare spikes, no realistic photographic sun, no clouds, no people, no UI chrome, no border/frame, no watermark, no clutter
